allow: Bash(cd adventure-game-web/app/pages/home/assets/slices/ && mv "4.9 分@3x.png" "icon_score.png" && mv "45 分钟@3x.png" "icon_duration.png" && mv "评分@3x.png" "rating_icon.png")

Bash(cd adventure-game-web/app/pages/home/assets/slices/ && ls *.png | grep -E "分 | 评分" | while read f; do if [ "$f" = "4.9 分@3x.png" ]; then mv "$f" "icon_score.png"; elif [ "$f" = "评分@3x.png" ]; then mv "$f" "rating_icon.png"; fi; done)

Bash(python3 -c "
import os
files = os.listdir\('.'\)
for f in files:
    if '4.9 分' in f:
        os.rename\(f, 'icon_score.png'\)
        print\(f'Renamed {f} to icon_score.png'\)
    elif '45 分钟' in f:
        os.rename\(f, 'icon_duration.png'\)
        print\(f'Renamed {f} to icon_duration.png'\)
    elif '评分' in f:
        os.rename\(f, 'rating_icon.png'\)
        print\(f'Renamed {f} to rating_icon.png'\)
")
